form.formComment: Racing consistently. Last start by a head (Fr2) at Kilmore (2:03.30) beating Elizajane in NR 45 to 48 on April 2 at $4. Has an inside draw and can feature again.

form.formComment: Looks well placed in this tougher race, but he was impressive winning two starts back [-+] tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; posted a big 6 m win when quickly away, (Fr2) at Kilmore (2:43.80) beating Hez Harrywho in NR 46 to 49 on March 26 at $5 at the bell was 2nd-3.73. Draws well so include.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 10 m finishing third after a quick start, behind Kiss Me Mini at Melton over 2240m in a NR 50 to 55 on March 20 at $6.50. Closing in on a win.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr4) over 1720m after showing early speed at Melton, at the bell was 3rd-5.93 beaten 11 m by Popcornfriday (2:01.90) in 0W/15 0K stake on March 28 at $11. This looks a winnable assignment.
